# Auto-Documentation System for Soupz-Stall

## Overview

When you use soupz-stall, it automatically creates and organizes all outputs (plans, code, docs) in a structured project folder.

---

## Auto-Generated Project Structure

```
your-project/
├── .soupz/
│   ├── session-2026-02-27-01-15.md (session log)
│   ├── personas-used.md (which personas were called)
│   └── cost-tracking.md (cost breakdown)
│
├── docs/
│   ├── architecture/
│   │   ├── system-design.md (from @architect)
│   │   ├── api-contracts.md
│   │   └── database-schema.sql
│   │
│   ├── design/
│   │   ├── user-flows.md (from @designer)
│   │   ├── wireframes.md
│   │   └── design-system.md
│   │
│   ├── planning/
│   │   ├── sprint-plan.md (from @planner)
│   │   ├── team-assignments.md
│   │   └── timeline.md
│   │
│   ├── research/
│   │   ├── tools-comparison.md (from @researcher)
│   │   └── api-evaluation.md
│   │
│   ├── strategy/
│   │   ├── business-strategy.md (from @strategist)
│   │   └── competitive-analysis.md
│   │
│   ├── testing/
│   │   ├── test-plan.md (from @qa)
│   │   └── edge-cases.md
│   │
│   ├── security/
│   │   ├── threat-model.md (from @security)
│   │   └── security-checklist.md
│   │
│   ├── deployment/
│   │   ├── infrastructure.md (from @devops)
│   │   └── ci-cd-pipeline.md
│   │
│   └── presentation/
│       ├── pitch-deck.md (from @presenter)
│       └── demo-script.md
│
├── src/ (code generated by personas)
├── tests/ (tests generated by @qa)
├── scripts/ (automation scripts)
├── README.md (auto-generated project overview)
└── MASTER_PLAN.md (from @master, if used)
```

---

## How It Works

### 1. Session Initialization

When you start soupz-stall in a directory:

```bash
$ cd my-project
$ soupz-stall

🔄 Initializing project structure...
✅ Created .soupz/ for session tracking
✅ Created docs/ for documentation
✅ Ready to work!

> @architect design an API
```

### 2. Auto-Save Outputs

Each persona automatically saves its output:

```bash
> @architect design a REST API

  🏗️ Tech Architect via copilot
  
  [Generates architecture...]
  
  ✅ Saved to: docs/architecture/system-design.md
  ✅ Saved to: docs/architecture/api-contracts.md
  ✅ Saved to: docs/architecture/database-schema.sql
```

### 3. Session Tracking

Everything is logged in `.soupz/`:

```markdown
# Session: 2026-02-27 01:15 AM

## Personas Used
1. @architect (01:15 AM) - Designed REST API
2. @designer (01:18 AM) - Created UI wireframes
3. @planner (01:22 AM) - Sprint breakdown

## Files Created
- docs/architecture/system-design.md
- docs/design/wireframes.md
- docs/planning/sprint-plan.md

## Commands Executed
- npm install express
- npm install react vite

## Cost
Total: $0.00
```

---

## Implementation

### Add to `src/session.js`

```javascript
async runPersona(personaId, prompt) {
    const persona = this.registry.get(personaId);
    
    // Initialize project structure if not exists
    await this.initProjectStructure();
    
    // Run persona
    const result = await this.orchestrator.runOn(toolId, enhancedPrompt, this.cwd);
    
    // Auto-save output
    await this.savePersonaOutput(personaId, result);
    
    // Log to session
    await this.logToSession(personaId, prompt, result);
}

async initProjectStructure() {
    const dirs = [
        '.soupz',
        'docs/architecture',
        'docs/design',
        'docs/planning',
        'docs/research',
        'docs/strategy',
        'docs/testing',
        'docs/security',
        'docs/deployment',
        'docs/presentation'
    ];
    
    for (const dir of dirs) {
        const path = join(this.cwd, dir);
        if (!existsSync(path)) {
            mkdirSync(path, { recursive: true });
        }
    }
}

async savePersonaOutput(personaId, output) {
    const mapping = {
        'architect': 'docs/architecture',
        'designer': 'docs/design',
        'planner': 'docs/planning',
        'researcher': 'docs/research',
        'strategist': 'docs/strategy',
        'qa': 'docs/testing',
        'security': 'docs/security',
        'devops': 'docs/deployment',
        'presenter': 'docs/presentation'
    };
    
    const dir = mapping[personaId] || 'docs';
    const timestamp = new Date().toISOString().replace(/:/g, '-').split('.')[0];
    const filename = `${personaId}-${timestamp}.md`;
    const filepath = join(this.cwd, dir, filename);
    
    writeFileSync(filepath, output, 'utf-8');
    console.log(chalk.green(`  ✅ Saved to: ${dir}/${filename}`));
}

async logToSession(personaId, prompt, result) {
    const sessionFile = join(this.cwd, '.soupz', `session-${this.sessionId}.md`);
    const entry = `
## ${new Date().toLocaleTimeString()} - @${personaId}
**Prompt**: ${prompt.substring(0, 100)}...
**Output**: Saved to docs/${personaId}/
**Cost**: $0.00

---
`;
    
    appendFileSync(sessionFile, entry, 'utf-8');
}
```

---

## Terminal Access

Yes! Soupz-stall has terminal access through tool agents:

### Via Copilot
```bash
> @devops install dependencies

  ⚙️ DevOps Engineer via copilot
  
  Running: npm install express cors dotenv
  
  ✅ Installed 45 packages
  ✅ Saved to: package.json
```

### Via Kiro
```bash
> @architect setup the project

  🏗️ Tech Architect via kiro
  
  Executing commands:
    $ mkdir -p src/routes src/controllers src/models
    $ npm init -y
    $ npm install express mongoose
    $ touch src/index.js
  
  ✅ Project structure created
  ✅ Dependencies installed
```

### Commands Logged
All terminal commands are logged in `.soupz/commands.log`:

```bash
# Session: 2026-02-27 01:15 AM

[01:15:23] npm install express
[01:15:45] mkdir -p src/routes
[01:16:02] npm run dev
```

---

## Example Session

### User Input
```bash
$ cd hackathon-project
$ soupz-stall

> @master
> Build a todo app with React + Node.js
> Team: 2 developers
> Deadline: 3 days
```

### Auto-Generated Structure
```
hackathon-project/
├── .soupz/
│   ├── session-2026-02-27-01-15.md
│   ├── commands.log
│   └── cost-tracking.md
│
├── docs/
│   ├── architecture/
│   │   ├── system-design-2026-02-27T01-15-30.md
│   │   ├── api-contracts-2026-02-27T01-15-45.md
│   │   └── database-schema.sql
│   │
│   ├── design/
│   │   ├── wireframes-2026-02-27T01-16-10.md
│   │   └── design-system-2026-02-27T01-16-25.md
│   │
│   ├── planning/
│   │   ├── sprint-plan-2026-02-27T01-16-40.md
│   │   └── team-assignments-2026-02-27T01-16-55.md
│   │
│   └── presentation/
│       └── pitch-deck-2026-02-27T01-17-10.md
│
├── src/
│   ├── index.js (created by @architect)
│   ├── routes/
│   └── controllers/
│
├── package.json (created by npm init)
├── README.md (auto-generated)
└── MASTER_PLAN.md (from @master)
```

### Session Log (`.soupz/session-2026-02-27-01-15.md`)
```markdown
# Soupz-Stall Session
**Started**: 2026-02-27 01:15 AM
**Project**: hackathon-project

## Timeline

### 01:15:30 - @master
**Prompt**: Build a todo app with React + Node.js...
**Action**: Spawned 5 personas in Batch 1
**Output**: MASTER_PLAN.md

### 01:15:45 - @architect
**Prompt**: Design system architecture
**Output**: docs/architecture/system-design.md
**Commands**: 
  - mkdir -p src/routes src/controllers
  - npm init -y
  - npm install express mongoose

### 01:16:10 - @designer
**Prompt**: Create UI wireframes
**Output**: docs/design/wireframes.md

### 01:16:40 - @planner
**Prompt**: 3-day sprint breakdown
**Output**: docs/planning/sprint-plan.md

## Summary
- **Personas Used**: 5 (master, architect, designer, planner, researcher)
- **Files Created**: 12
- **Commands Executed**: 5
- **Total Cost**: $0.00
- **Duration**: 2m 15s
```

---

## Benefits

✅ **Organized**: Everything in its place
✅ **Trackable**: See what happened when
✅ **Shareable**: Send docs/ to team
✅ **Reproducible**: Commands logged
✅ **Professional**: Clean structure
✅ **Automatic**: No manual organization

---

## Commands

### View Session
```bash
$ cat .soupz/session-*.md
```

### View All Outputs
```bash
$ tree docs/
```

### View Commands
```bash
$ cat .soupz/commands.log
```

### View Costs
```bash
$ cat .soupz/cost-tracking.md
```

---

## Configuration

Create `.soupzrc` in project root:

```yaml
auto_save: true
output_dir: docs
session_dir: .soupz
timestamp_format: "YYYY-MM-DD-HH-mm-ss"
log_commands: true
track_costs: true
```

---

**This makes soupz-stall a complete project management system!**
